summary:
The provided evidence contains no information about regulatory T cells (Tregs) or their functional role in modulating immune responses. As all referenced content pertains to immuno-suppressive therapies aimed at reducing immune activity, it supports concluding that Tregs—being unmentioned—are not considered positive regulators within this specific evidentiary framework.  

$\boxed{B}$
